title: Kth Smallest Element in a BST
input_format: The root of a binary search tree, and an integer `k`.
output_format: The `k`th smallest value (1-indexed) of all the values of the nodes in the tree.
constraints:
- The number of nodes in the tree is `n`.
- `1 <= k <= n <= 10^4`
- `0 <= Node.val <= 10^4`
function_signature: function kthSmallest(root: TreeNode | null, k: number): number {}
